description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two jobs, fedora-rpm-build and centos-rpm-build, both running on ubuntu-latest. The fedora-rpm-build job uses a fedora:34 container to install tools and dependencies, then build an RPM package using a mouse_m908.spec file. The centos-rpm-build job uses a centos:8 container to install tools and dependencies, enable powertools, then build the same RPM package.
